name: GetAccept Digital Sales Room API
what_it_does: Digital sales room and proposal platform with REST API — enabling sales teams to create interactive deal rooms with proposals, contracts, videos, and pricing tables, track buyer engagement analytics, collect eSignatures, send automated follow-up notifications, and integrate buyer interactions with CRM for complete deal visibility.
use_calls: Creating digital deal rooms with proposal content via API for automated proposal delivery
Querying buyer engagement analytics (views, time-spent, signed sections) for deal intelligence
Integrating GetAccept engagement data with Salesforce for opportunity health scoring
Automating deal room creation when CRM opportunities reach proposal stage
Pulling eSignature completion events for contract workflow automation
not_for: Complex CPQ with product configuration rules (use DealHub or Apttus for CPQ)
RFP response automation (use Loopio or RFPIO)
Full contract lifecycle management after signing (use Ironclad or DocuSign CLM)
best_when: A B2B sales team wants modern, interactive deal rooms that replace static PDF proposals with buyer-specific content hubs featuring engagement analytics, eSignature, and real-time buyer intent signals.
avoid_when: You need complex product configuration pricing, RFP response automation, or post-signature contract management rather than the sales process itself.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Bearer token with user-scoped access. Webhook for document view, signature, and completion events. Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive native integrations. API token option for server-side integrations. Org-level and user-level access tokens.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited deal rooms
pricing.notes: Swedish company (Stockholm). Founded 2015. Raised $37M+. Backed by Draper Esprit. Digital Sales Room differentiator — buyer-facing micro-site with all deal materials. Video messaging from rep built-in. Real-time buyer activity notifications (rep gets alert when prospect opens proposal). Chat widget in deal room. Mutual action plan feature. Popular with Nordic and US B2B SaaS companies.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for documents, recipients, analytics, and signatures. OAuth2 auth. Good API documentation. Deal room content created via template — API instantiates from templates. Buyer engagement events delivered via webhook in real-time. eSignature flow managed by GetAccept.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Document reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Signature status reads idempotent. Document creation not idempotent — check for existing document before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 required — more complex than API key auth
Deal room content templates must be created in GetAccept admin before API instantiation
Buyer engagement analytics require recipient to access deal room link
GDPR: buyer engagement tracking is behavioral — consent consideration
Video messaging requires rep to record in app — not API-triggered

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU and US data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Buyer engagement data is behavioral PII — GDPR consent for EU buyers. Contract documents and pricing are sensitive. eSignature audit trail must be preserved per legal requirements. Swedish company with GDPR-native design.
